rules.description: Change space to left shift if held and space pressed alone
Remap keys to use Dvorak keyboard layout with adjustments from ThePrimeagen
Change caps_lock to left_control if pressed with other keys, escape if pressed alone.
Change enter to left_control if pressed with other keys, enter if pressed alone.
Map fn + number keys to their corresponding function keys (rev 1)
Change caps_lock to left_control if pressed with other keys, escape if pressed alone.
Change enter to left_control if pressed with other keys, enter if pressed alone.
Change space to left shift if held and space pressed alone
